news.headline: Global Colemanite market expected to reach USD 2.36B by 2033 with 4.7% CAGR. Demand was USD 1.45B in 2023, projected to be USD 1.56B in 2024.
news.summary: The global Colemanite market was valued at approximately USD 1.45 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 1.56 billion in 2024. By 2033, it is expected to reach around USD 2.36 billion, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 4.7% during the forecast period 2024 to 2033. Key growth factors include the rising demand for borates in industries like glass, ceramics, agriculture, and detergents, technological advancements in mining and processing, sustainable mining practices, economic growth in emerging markets, and expansion of production capacities by major players in the market. Major partnerships and acquisitions in the industry have also been highlighted.

news.summary: In Washington, a significant announcement is scheduled for Tuesday, October 24, 2024, regarding the status of American veterans and their families. Secretary Denis McDonough will provide this update. news.headline: DENSO, a Japan-based manufacturer, to add 200 jobs in Athens, TN, expanding production for cleaner mobility solutions.
news.summary: Japanese-based manufacturing company plans to create 200 new jobs in Athens, Tennessee, as part of their initiative to boost production of products that promote environmentally-friendly transportation. The expansion is set to create a positive impact on the region's economy, supported by Governor Bill Lee and Department of Economic and Community Development Commissioner Stuart C. McWhorter.

news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Ethema Health Corporation's subsidiary ARIA received its license to operate an inpatient detoxication and Residential Level 1 facility in West Palm Beach, Florida. Ethema Health Corporation is listed as OTCPINK: GRST. This news was announced on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Peoples Ltd. (OTC: PPLL) declares $0.63/share cash dividend and 5% stock dividend, payable on Dec. 13, 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Wyalusing, Pennsylvania, Peoples Ltd.'s (OTC: PPLL) Board of Directors announced a fourth quarter cash dividend of $0.63 per share alongside a 5% stock dividend. These dividends are scheduled to be paid out on December 13, 2024. The cash dividend for the fourth quarter of 2024 has been set at $0.63 per share.

news.headline: KBRA rates 10 classes of mortgage pass-through certificates from CROSS 2024-H7 Mortgage Trust, totaling $493.0 million.
news.summary: KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to ten classes of mortgage pass-through certificates from the CROSS 2024-H7 Mortgage Trust, an RMBS transaction issued under the Hildene-CCC Loan Acquisition, LLC shelf. The transaction, sponsored by Hildene Capital Management in affiliation with CrossCountry Mortgage and CrossCountry Capital, is valued at $493.0 million. It is backed by a pool of 923 residential mortgages.

Aqueous Zinc Flow Battery Market forecasted to reach $259.6 million by 2024-2034, led by Invinity Energy Systems, Sumitomo Electric, and more.
news.summary: A report on the Aqueous Zinc Flow Battery Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market is forecasted to experience substantial growth, driven by key factors and market drivers. In an optimistic scenario, the market is expected to reach a valuation of $259.6 million by 2024 and is anticipated to grow further in the coming years. The report provides a global and regional analysis focusing on applications, chemistry, storage, and regions from 2024 to 2034.

news.headline: Nilfisk releases Q3 2024 financial results, updates 2024 outlook due to weakening demand in Americas.
news.summary: Nilfisk has released its preliminary financial results for the third quarter of 2024, indicating a decrease in demand in the Americas. The company has adjusted its financial outlook for the remainder of 2024 in response to these market conditions. The specific numbers have not been disclosed, but the update suggests potential challenges in achieving previously set financial targets for the year. This shift in demand is likely to impact the company's overall performance and strategic planning for the upcoming quarters.

news.headline: Legible Inc. increases unit offering to $3.08 million from $2.1 million, selling 15,000,000 units at $0.14 per unit.
news.summary: Legible Inc. recently updated its offering of units, aiming to sell up to 15,000,000 units at $0.14 per unit with a gross proceeds target of $2,100,000. Each unit comprises a common share and a whole common share purchase warrant allowing the holder to acquire one common share at $0.14 by a certain date. The warrants can be accelerated if the common shares reach a certain price for five consecutive trading days. The offering is being conducted under exemptions from relevant securities laws.

news.headline: Banca Progetto faces allegations of lending to Mafia by Oaktree.
Monopar Therapeutics stock surges 4X after licensing ALXN-1840 from AstraZeneca for Wilson's disease; deal involves cash, equity and milestones.
news.summary: Monopar Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ:MNPR) saw a significant spike in its stock value as it announced an exclusive worldwide licensing agreement with AstraZeneca Plc’s (NASDAQ:AZN) Alexion for ALXN-1840 (bis-choline tetrathiomolybdate), targeted towards treating Wilson’s disease. This agreement entrusts Monopar with all future global development and commercialization responsibilities. The deal involves an upfront cash sum and equity issuance to Alexion by Monopar, with additional payments structured around tiered royalties linked to net sales, as well as predetermined regulatory and sales milestones. Wilson's disease is a rare genetic ailment affecting approximately one in 30,000 live births, characterized by the body’s impaired ability to expel excess copper.

news.headline: Visa partners with USAID to boost digital government platforms in Sub-Saharan Africa & beyond, committed to five-year collaboration for economic development.
news.summary: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) has announced a partnership with the United States Agency for International Development (USAID) to improve worldwide access to open, secure, and inclusive digital government systems. The collaboration, slated for five years, involves assisting governments in creating and utilizing digital platforms that link residents to essential local services. This initiative seeks to promote economic growth by combining knowledge in digital transactions and government infrastructures, as well as bolstering support for individuals and small-to-medium enterprises in specific markets. Visa and USAID are working together to enhance and deploy digital government systems.

news.headline: Meta Platforms stock up 25% in past quarter; Q3 earnings report on Oct. 30. Expected earnings per share $5.24, revenue $40.253 billion. Meta has surpassed analyst estimates for 6 straight quarters. Last quarter, revenue up 11% YoY, daily actives up 7%.
news.summary: Shares of Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ:META) have surged by almost 25% in the last quarter, setting the stage for the upcoming earnings report next week. The tech giant is slated to release its third-quarter financial results on Oct. 30. Analysts are forecasting earnings of $5.24 per share and revenue of $40.253 billion for the company. Meta has outperformed analyst expectations for both revenue and earnings in the last six quarters leading up to this report. In the previous quarter, Meta exceeded estimates with an 11% increase in revenue and a 7% rise in daily active users. The company also highlighted the success of Meta AI, poised to become the most widely used AI assistant. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Standard Chartered predicts Bitcoin to hit $73k on election day, $80k if Trump wins; options data and betting odds boost confidence.
news.summary: Standard Chartered has forecasted that Bitcoin may reach $73,000 before the U.S. presidential election on Nov. 5, and could surpass $80,000 soon after if Donald Trump wins. The bank's analysis, using current options data and betting odds, indicates that Bitcoin is gaining momentum due to Trump's lead in key polls. Geoffrey Kendrick from Standard Chartered mentioned that with the likelihood of a Trump victory at 59%, Bitcoin's value is expected to rise leading up to the election. If Trump does win, there could be a 4% increase in BTC, potentially reaching $76,000. The bank's prediction is primarily based on Bitcoin options break-even.

news.headline: IBM stock drops post-Q3 report with revenue missing mark. AI business hits $3B but overall Q3 revenue falls short.
news.summary: After releasing its Q3 report, IBM experienced a decline in stock value. The company's AI business recorded $3 billion in Q3, however, the overall revenue fell short of expectations. The drop in IBM stock following the revenue miss was highlighted as a concerning trend, although analysts suggest that this trend may help mitigate the impact.

news.headline: Nasdaq rose initially, Dow Jones dropped by 200 points, with Tesla seeing gains; gold miner triggered sell rule.
news.summary: Today, the stock market had a positive start on Thursday with early trading mostly bullish. This was driven by a decrease in weekly jobless claims and a flurry of earnings reports. The Nasdaq showed gains initially but later faded, while the Dow Jones experienced a drop of 200 points. Notably, Tesla shares soared while a gold miner triggered a sell rule. Overall, the market presented mixed dynamics, reflecting the ongoing volatility and uncertainties.

news.headline: Institute for Sport & Social Justice honors sports leaders in annual gala, including president of NASCAR and Women's Basketball Legend. Orlando, FL - Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Tonight's event in Orlando, Florida on October 24, 2024, held by the Institute for Sport and Social Justice will recognize prominent figures in sports, such as the president of NASCAR and a Women's Basketball Legend. This celebration aims to honor sports leaders and advocates for their contributions to the industry. The event will gather esteemed individuals to appreciate the achievements of these individuals in promoting social justice through sports.

CACI President & CEO John Mengucci honored with 2024 Technology Good Scout Award by Boy Scouts, Washington D.C. area.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia, CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) disclosed that John Mengucci, President and CEO of CACI, was presented with the 2024 Technology Good Scout Award by the Boy Scouts of America National Capital Area Council. This accolade is granted to exceptional technology leaders in the greater Washington, D.C. region who embody the principles of the Scout Oath and Law in their professional and personal conduct. Mengucci expressed gratitude for being chosen for this recognition.

news.headline: Researchers at CHOP discover new immunotherapy target for neuroblastoma and other cancers, offering hope for treatment.
news.summary: A recent study unveiled promising advancements in the treatment of neuroblastoma, a potentially fatal childhood cancer affecting the peripheral nervous system. Conducted by researchers at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP), the findings bring hope to enhancing treatment effectiveness. The study, conducted in Philadelphia, revealed positive outcomes in the battle against neuroblastoma, offering valuable insights to the medical community. The breakthrough was shared on Oct. 24, 2024, through a press release by CHOP. With these developments, the fight against pediatric cancer takes a significant step forward, potentially impacting the lives of many young patients.

news.headline: AMDA sponsors Season 5 of BroadwayWorld's Next on Stage Competition, the biggest national competition for students.
news.summary: In New York on October 24, 2024, AMDA College of the Performing Arts revealed its support for Season 5 of BroadwayWorld's Next on Stage contest. This competition is renowned as Broadway's largest national platform for high school and college students. The fifth season is anticipated to draw a significant amount of participants and engagement.

news.headline: Kroger predicts top 5 food trends for 2025, with emerging trends and popular items for the year.
news.summary: In Cincinnati on October 24, 2024, The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) announced its projections for the top five food trends of 2025. These forecasts, crafted by Kroger's renowned team, offer insights into upcoming consumer behaviors and popular products. The company delves into emerging trends and anticipates the key food preferences for the coming year.

news.headline: 53 counterparties take $202.798b at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
S&P Global's Q3 earnings beat with adjusted EPS of $3.89, sales of $3.575 billion representing a 16% increase.
news.summary: S&P Global Inc (NYSE:SPGI) announced that their quarterly adjusted EPS stood at $3.89, surpassing the analyst consensus estimate of $3.64, reflecting a 21% surge compared to the previous year. The quarterly sales amounted to $3.575 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus of $3.431 billion, marking a 16% increase year over year, fueled by growth across all divisions. This success resulted in a stock price decline following the announcement. Adjusted operating profit margin saw a rise of 180 basis points, totaling 48.8%, mainly attributed to revenue growth in its Ratings and Indices divisions.

news.headline: Delivery robots making their way to your area soon! Stay tuned for these automated deliveries hitting streets.
Bernstein report predicts Robinhood will dominate crypto investing with 15 tokens, 70% market cap, targeting millennials.
news.summary: A recent report from Bernstein suggests that Robinhood (HOOD) is poised to emerge as the top cryptocurrency investment platform. The report emphasizes Robinhood's strength in the sector due to its wide selection of 15 crypto tokens, accounting for 70% of the market cap. With a median user age of 34, Robinhood's focus on a younger demographic positions it well to take advantage of the growing wealth of millennials. This development could lead to Robinhood becoming a key player in the cryptocurrency space in the future.

news.headline: Positive interim data from Phase 1 SEAPORT 1 trial of INZ-701 by Inozyme Pharma: boosts plasma PPi levels in ESKD patients undergoing hemodialysis, linked to calciphylaxis.
news.summary: A recent study showed that INZ-701, a new treatment, was well-received by patients with end-stage kidney disease (ESKD) undergoing hemodialysis. The treatment resulted in a notable increase in plasma pyrophosphate (PPi) levels, which are critical for patients with ESKD. Low PPi levels are linked to calciphylaxis, a rare but severe complication of ESKD. This study highlights the importance of maintaining adequate PPi levels in patients with ESKD, as it could potentially prevent life-threatening outcomes.

news.headline: Babyletto introduces Pogo All-Stages Collection, a new stylish addition to the nursery. Los Angeles, Oct 24, 2024.
news.summary: A well-known nursery brand based in Los Angeles has unveiled their latest innovation in crib design. Babyletto has introduced the Pogo All-Stages Collection, which follows the success of their original 8-in-1 crib. This new collection is expected to set the standard for multifunctional cribs, offering stylish options for all stages of a child's growth. This development was announced on October 24, 2024, through a press release.

news.headline: West Pharmaceutical (WST) reports Q3 EPS of $1.85 (down from $2.16), sales of $746.9 million, boosting forecast due to rising syringe demand.
news.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE:WST) released their quarterly report on Thursday, showcasing an adjusted EPS of $1.85, a decrease from $2.16 compared to the previous year but surpassing the expected $1.50. The company reported total sales of $746.9 million, which exceeded the anticipated $709.62 million. Within their Proprietary Products Segment, sales saw a slight decrease of 0.2% amounting to $601.4 million, with organic net sales declining by 0.5%. Notably, high-value products such as components and devices made up over 75% of segment net sales during the period. This strong performance was primarily attributed to the growing customer demand for self-injection device platforms.

news.headline: ECB's Lane: Recent surveys suggest wage growth is moderating.
Gold is having its best year since 1979, with a 33% surge in value. Bonds are down 6.7%, marking the fourth year of losses.
news.summary: Geopolitical tensions and the Federal Reserve's switch to rate cuts have set the stage for gold to have its most impressive year in over 40 years in 2024. Tracked by the SPDR Gold Trust (NYSE: GLD), gold has surged by 33% so far this year as of Oct. 22, positioning it for its strongest performance since 1979, when it soared by 136%. On the other hand, U.S. long-dated Treasury bonds are facing challenges. The iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (NASDAQ: TLT) has experienced a 6.7% decline in 2024, marking the fourth consecutive year of losses and a significant 48% decrease from its high in 2020. This contrast has led some experts, like veteran Wall Street investor Ed Yardeni, to suggest selling bonds and investing in gold as a potentially more lucrative option.

news.headline: Big Lots postpones crucial meeting related to Nexus acquisition bid. Key dates and details undisclosed.
Siemens & thyssenkrupp use AI to bridge manufacturing skills gap by harnessing Microsoft Azure's OpenAI Service.
news.summary: Siemens and thyssenkrupp have implemented AI-powered solutions to tackle the talent shortage in the manufacturing sector, making use of Microsoft Azure's OpenAI Service. This initiative aims to enhance workforce capabilities in the industry by harnessing advanced technologies.

Ingram, supported by Platinum Equity, soars 17% post $409M IPO.
Discover the fusion of crypto and AI for groundbreaking changes in the digital realm, creating the 'Agentic Web'.
news.summary: The fusion of cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence is set to revolutionize the digital economy, offering significant improvements in accessibility and transparency. This integration is paving the way for what is being called the 'Agentic Web'. This innovative development has the potential to greatly impact various industries, with experts predicting a substantial increase in efficiencies and opportunities for growth. The trend is gaining momentum, with a notable increase in investments seen in this space. Stay informed about this cutting-edge advancement to stay ahead in the rapidly evolving landscape of technology and finance.

news.headline: IMF raises US growth forecast for 2024 to 2.8%, warns of surging public debt and long-term risks due to deficits.
news.summary: The IMF's latest World Economic Outlook report delivered a mixed message on the U.S. economy. It raised the forecast for U.S. growth in 2024 to 2.8%, which is a 0.2 percentage point increase from its previous estimate in July. The report attributed this growth to strong consumer spending, solid business investment, and Federal Reserve's monetary policy change with a 50 basis point cut in September 2024. However, the IMF also warned about the country's fiscal trajectory, stating that the U.S. public debt will continue to surge, with long-term risks from persistent deficits and rising debt-servicing costs.

news.headline: IMF meetings overshadowed by threat of Trump's tariffs.
Federal Home Loan Bank of Atlanta released Q3 2024 financial highlights. Full results expected by November 7.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Federal Home Loan Bank of Atlanta (the Bank) has revealed its preliminary unaudited financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2024. These figures are estimated until the Bank officially discloses its unaudited financial results in Form 10-Q, anticipated to be submitted to the SEC around November 7, 2024. The Bank is expected to provide more detailed figures in the upcoming filing, but for now, the reported highlights for the third quarter of 2024 include an approximate summary of financial performance.

news.headline: Ivans Index Q3 2024 shows premium renewal rates for major commercial lines up YoY, except Workers' Comp. Commercial Auto rate averaged 9.71% in Q3, BOP rate decreased to 8.68% from 9.48% in Q2. General Liability also saw a decrease in premium renewal rates in Q3.
news.summary: In Q3 2024, Ivans Index™ reported changes in premium renewal rates for major commercial insurance lines in the US. Compared to Q2 2024, Business Owner's Policy (BOP), General Liability, and Umbrella saw decreases in average premium rates while other lines of business experienced increases. Specifically, Commercial Auto's average renewal rate rose from 9.27% to 9.71%, with July at 9.73% and September at 9.67%. BOP's average decreased from 9.48% to 8.68%, reaching its low in August (8.62%) and high in September (8.76%). General Liability experienced a similar trend. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
